message:
fix(alloc,fuse,harness): harden allocator, simplify FUSE ops, and expand E2E test coverage

Allocator (ffs-alloc):
- Tighten bitmap scan bounds checking and add safety comments for
  unchecked bit operations to prevent out-of-bounds access in
  block allocation

FUSE layer (ffs-fuse):
- Simplify file operation implementations by reducing redundant
  error path branching

CI:
- Add new workflow steps for expanded test coverage

Test harness:
- Update conformance test to align with new allocator invariants
- Massively expand FUSE E2E test suite (~635 new lines) covering
  concurrent operations, edge cases, and stress scenarios

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -56,6 +56,12 @@ jobs:
       - name: Unit tests
         run: cargo test --workspace
 
+      - name: ffs-block all-features check
+        run: cargo check -p ffs-block --all-features --all-targets
+
+      - name: ffs-block all-features tests
+        run: cargo test -p ffs-block --all-features
+
   # Golden verification requires fixture images which are large.
   # This job regenerates them from scratch for consistent verification.
   golden-verification:
